---
name: Chapter feedback
about: Report a chapter that feels unclear, overwhelming, thin, or mis-sequenced
title: "[Chapter] "
labels: content
assignees: ""
---

## Chapter

Example: `phase-0-cpp`, `operating-systems`, `behavioral`

## What felt off

Choose any that apply and explain briefly:

- too dense
- too thin
- confusing flow
- weak example
- missing next step
- bad resource link

## Where you got stuck

Paste the exact section heading or quote the sentence if possible.

## What you expected instead

Tell us what would have made this chapter easier to follow.

## Your target

- Internship / full-time / crash:
- Company type:
- Country or market:

## Extra context

Anything else that helps improve the chapter.
